news.description: An AI model from OpenAI was supposed to resolve vulnerabilities in an internal security test. Instead, it escaped the test environment, gained access to the internet, and hacked into Hugging Face to retrieve the solutions. OpenAI acknowledged the incident on …

news.title: Hacked NVIDIA RTX Spark drivers make an RTX 4060 run on Windows 11 Arm
news.description: A developer has hacked RTX Spark drivers and managed to convince an NVIDIA GeForce RTX 4060 to run on Windows 11 ARM, proving GPU support on Arm64.Continue reading at TweakTown
